block_00: Trade better with a trading journal
block_01: A trading journal is not a chore that you do for the sake of duty. It is a powerful trading tool that can help you boost your trading performance. It is versatile, easy to set up and extremely helpful. Novice traders oftentimes completely ignore it — and they don’t know what they are missing.
block_02: The concept of learning-by-doing is very important in trading. Luckily, a trading journal can help you learn faster. Just write down all your deals and analyze them later. Thus, you will understand what distinguishes profitable deals from detrimental ones.
block_03: Read the full article to learn about three different ways in which a trading journal can help you improve your trading results.
